title: HoloPath
description:
HoloPath - Trajectory Visualizer for Minecraft 1.21.1-1.21.11

Ever wondered exactly where your ender pearl will land HoloPath renders a real-time holographic trajectory line showing the exact path of your throwables and projectiles before you release them
body:
**HoloPath** — Trajectory Visualizer for Minecraft 1.21.1-1.21.11

Ever wondered exactly where your ender pearl will land? HoloPath renders a real-time holographic trajectory line showing the exact path of your throwables and projectiles before you release them.

Supported Items:


- Ender Pearl
  
- Bow (draw strength sensitive — the line updates as you pull back)
  
- Snowball

Features:


- Real-time 3D trajectory line that updates as you move and aim
  
- Color changes to red when the path passes through a living entity — so you know if your shot               will hit before you throw
  
- Dashed line style for clear visibility without cluttering your screen
  
- Toggle the display on or off at any time with a keybind (default: K)
  
- Keybind is fully rebindable from Options → Controls → HoloPath
  
- A reminder message appears in chat when you join a world, telling you the current keybind

How to Use:


- Hold an ender pearl, bow, or snowball
  
- Aim — the trajectory line appears automatically
  
- Pull back your bow to see the arc adjust in real time based on draw strength
  
- If the line turns red, a living entity is in the path
  
- Press K to hide the display when you don't need it
  
  
Client-side only — works in singleplayer and on any server without requiring the mod to be installed server-side.
